role: Sr. AR Learning & Development Program Lead
role_full_title: Sr. Automated Retail (AR) Learning & Development Program Lead
confirmation_text: All right! We've received your job application for our open position here at The Pokémon Company International. ... Best, The Pokémon Talent Acquisition Team
screenshot: MCP screenshot store ID ss_0011lfotg (confirmation page). Verification-gate screenshots: ss_3631cwo1k (pre-submit), ss_3986wvbjq (contact block), ss_7277umrmx (screening). Not auto-saved to disk by MCP.
resume_used: YiChieh_Cheng_resume.pdf (Jamie's own saved Simplify-profile resume, default)
fill_mechanism: Simplify autofill (contact + resume + education) + manual correction/fill of all React-select screening dropdowns
scope_assessment: GENUINE L&D / training-program-design role (NOT accounts-receivable/finance — 'AR' = Automated Retail, Pokémon's kiosk business). Core duties = build/manage training programs, design role-based learning, facilitate, train-the-trainer, content ownership, training metrics. This is Jamie's sweet spot (P1b L&D / program management). HOWEVER it is a SENIOR STRETCH: requires 8-11 yrs total + 5+ yrs designing/delivering TECHNICAL training for FIELD-SERVICE / SERVICE-DESK technicians + ITSM/ticketing platform + diagnostic/break-fix domain — experience Jamie genuinely lacks (she has ~3 yrs L&D for a college-admissions company). Applied per doctrine (no hard-stop present; push forward in fit-order; employer decides). Honest match modest (~55-60, large YOE + domain gap), but TRUE values throughout — no fabrication of the technical-training years.
hard_stop_check: PASSED — no explicit 'no sponsorship' clause (form asks sponsorship as neutral question; JD says company may arrange a visa for some roles), no ITAR/US-Person requirement, not clerical-primary. People Manager: No (IC role, not a people-management seniority block).

notes: Found via Jamie's LinkedIn feed (clicked role). LinkedIn keyword search returned no live posting (LinkedIn listing appears expired/closed ~1wk old), but the role is LIVE on the canonical Greenhouse board — applied there directly. KEY TRUTH-GATE CATCH: Simplify free-tier autofilled the two TPCi yes/no history questions as 'Yes' (both factually FALSE for Jamie); these were manually corrected to 'No' before submission. Also fixed the Location field — Simplify left raw text 'Portland, OR, USA' which failed Greenhouse's geocomplete validation (blocked first submit); reselected 'Portland, Oregon, United States' from the dropdown, then submission succeeded. No CAPTCHA. No account required.
